title: geum pyrenaicum
intro: Geum pyrenaicum, also known as the Pyrenean Avens, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geum pyrenaicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Geum pyrenaicum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin for therapeutic purposes.
